name: Oven Poached Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a piece of foil with Pam cooking spray.
2. Place the salmon on the center of the foil.
3. Add lemon juice and sherry to the salmon.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Open the foil, add butter and dill to the salmon.
6. Close the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes more.
